project.name: Omen
project.tagline: Prediction markets where an AI trades against you.
project.description: Omen is a prediction market appchain where an AI agent named omen-ai.init proposes binary markets from live Ethereum mainnet signals, takes positions on its own questions with Claude-generated reasoning, and resolves them when the time is up. The agent has a public P&L, and users can bet alongside or against it. Built as a sovereign MiniEVM rollup on Initia (omen-1) with InterwovenKit for wallet UX, autosign for signless betting, the Interwoven Bridge for one-click USDC onboarding, and .init usernames for human-readable leaderboards.

initia_native_features.notes: Configured per-chain to auto-approve /minievm.evm.v1.MsgCall. Demonstrated in app via banner + button.
Calls openBridge() from useInterwovenKit. Local-rollup limitation documented inline per Initia hackathon guidance.
Resolves via useUsernameQuery from @initia/interwovenkit-react. Agent identity is omen-ai.init.

contracts.name: MarketFactory
contracts.purpose: Spawns markets and resolves them; agent-only access

agent.behavior: Proposes 3 markets per round (every 3h cron), takes a position on each with stated reasoning, resolves due markets every 5min by reading chain state.
